title: Croatian Apple Strudel
description: A classic Croatian dessert with a sweet and sophisticated twist. Flaky puff pastry filled with tender apples, cinnamon, and sugar.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced apples, granulated sugar, and ground cinnamon.
Spread the apple mixture evenly over the center of the puff pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Dot the top of the apple mixture with the unsalted butter.
Fold the 1-inch border of the puff pastry up over the apple mixture, pressing gently to seal.
Roll the strudel into a tight log and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the top of the strudel with a little bit of water and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
Bake the strudel in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the strudel from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
